description: Authoritative list of every file that must be rewritten in lockstep whenever a hub's compiled-routing directive wording changes (for example, an eventual default-on flip). This manifest is the single source of truth for that surface set; the normalized-parity fixture test (compiled-routing-lockstep-parity.test.cjs) reads it to compare current wording across all surfaces, and any later activation-cutover work reads it as its rewrite-target list.
notes: A surface without the directiveMarker present is not a violation by itself — it is a safe, inert 'not rendered yet' state (a legacy scaffold or a not-yet-updated template). Only surfaces that DO carry the directive and disagree after hub-name normalization count as drifted.

hubName is null for the two create-skill parent templates because their source form carries the literal hubNamePlaceholder token, not a real hub name — normalization treats that literal token as already-normalized.
